## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss ongoing client projects and their progress.](https://fathom.video/share/_QyqEbPy_Uyz9Kn9k2YnwPPQL7Y4ixZW?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Outreach kickoff moved to week 2; 6-month agreement with no opt-out clause](https://fathom.video/share/_QyqEbPy_Uyz9Kn9k2YnwPPQL7Y4ixZW?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [SentinelOne needs more input from client teams; product deep dives scheduled for next week](https://fathom.video/share/_QyqEbPy_Uyz9Kn9k2YnwPPQL7Y4ixZW?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Okta project lacks clarity; need to identify low-hanging fruit and schedule recurring calls](https://fathom.video/share/_QyqEbPy_Uyz9Kn9k2YnwPPQL7Y4ixZW?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

  - [Met with James and team; Daryl taking over](https://fathom.video/share/_QyqEbPy_Uyz9Kn9k2YnwPPQL7Y4ixZW?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)

### Town Project Status

  - [Daryl completed 4 blogs](https://fathom.video/share/_QyqEbPy_Uyz9Kn9k2YnwPPQL7Y4ixZW?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

### Augment Code Update

## Next Steps

  - Follow up with Outreach on core approver and team structure
  - Conduct product deep dives for SentinelOne next week

  - Resolve Interwell's insurance loading issue by Monday
  - Follow up on Augment Code's MCP page review and push for content publishing
